events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess valve cover seep. Scenario: slight dampness with dust accumulation along lower edge valve cover gasket, no drips, oil level full, no consumption. 140k miles. This is normal seepage/worn gasket but not active leak requiring immediate repair. Disposition: monitor, not fail. Decision likely pass (no immediate action). Risk low. Work stage in-service. Component conditions: worn. percent_complete maybe 0? The task is assessment; overall progress? Could be 0 because no repair work performed. value 0. confidence high ~0.95. findings: slight oil seepage at valve cover gasket, dust accumulation indicates minor weep, no active dripping or oil loss. actions: recommend monitoring at next service, clean area, advise customer, no immediate repair needed. rationale. references: OEM service info. Need ensure JSON valid.
